task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagrams.net or draw.io application interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Add the required network shapes to the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 6 shapes are present on the canvas, including a cloud shape and multiple rectangle or computer/server shapes.

task_completion.description: Label the shapes with the required network element names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels on the shapes match the required elements: 'Internet', 'Router', 'Switch', 'PC1', 'PC2', 'PC3', and 'Server'.

task_completion.description: Connect the network elements with lines to represent the topology.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 5 connecting lines are drawn between the shapes (e.g., linking the Internet to the Router, Router to Switch, and Switch to the PCs/Server).

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as office_network.drawio to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the application title bar shows the file is named 'office_network.drawio' and the save location is the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop).

integrity.description: Agent used the diagrams.net GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the graphical interface, using the mouse to drag, drop, and connect shapes, rather than using command-line tools.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually write the .drawio XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor (such as nano, vim, or gedit) is used to manually type out the XML structure of the .drawio file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal scripts to generate the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to script, curl, or echo the creation of the office_network.drawio file directly to the Desktop.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must be saved exactly as 'office_network.drawio' on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop). It must contain at least 6 shapes (ideally 7: Internet cloud, Router, Switch, PC1, PC2, PC3, Server) and at least 5 connecting lines between these devices.
